base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of sky_base_zone — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1991 sonic the hedgehog. Sky Base Zone — flying-fortress + Eggman final-boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Sky Base Zone — flying-fortress + Eggman final-boss
